prompt: Generate a cultural illustration that fuses the architectural grandeur of image 1 with intricate floral embellishments from image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate an illustrative artwork that fuses the grand, white marble architecture and symmetrical layout of image 1 with the intricate, colorful floral embellishments from image 2. The stylized botanical motifs and flowing vine patterns from image 2 should intricately adorn the exterior surfaces, arches, and the central dome of the architectural structure from image 1, creating a visually rich and culturally resonant design.
